The '''Glonnk Clan''' was a clan of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] native to [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. Their fortress was located near the [[Norgk clan]]'s obliterated fortress.<ref name="TEGtPaM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref>
